title: What manga is this image from
display_title: What manga is this image from
wikitext:
[]: What manga is this image from? Post by chaosakita » Wed Nov 02, 2011 8:08 pm [img]http://s3.amazonaws.com/data.tumblr.com/tumblr_lu132qnDfS1qcsj9co1_1280.jpg?AWSAccessKeyId=AKIAJ6IHWSU3BX3X7X3Q&Expires=1320369019&Signature=Ky%2BOiZKh2zUeEDdwKO1H09xqd7o%3D[/img] Is it from the regular manga, a doujin, or what?

[]: Post by Stryker » Wed Nov 02, 2011 8:12 pm This is from the actual manga. I won't link, but you can find the manga on the internet somewhere. BTW, there is an image request thread/thing somewhere on this forum...

[]: Post by Final Messenger » Wed Nov 02, 2011 8:13 pm Looks like Sadamoto’s manga (although I have not read the most recent chapter I know Shinji is fighting the Harpies in it)

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Nov 02, 2011 8:16 pm It's from stage 85 of the official Evangelion manga by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto.
